dict.string: This app uses the microphone to record audio during specific app features such as communication or voice-related functions.
This app allows users to select photos from the photo library for profile pictures, verification, and operational purposes.
This app allows users to save generated or downloaded images to the photo library.
Camera access is required for identity verification, attendance validation, and account security features.
This app uses your location to verify attendance, support operational activities, and provide location-based services while using the app.
This app may access your location to support attendance verification and operational location tracking when required by authorized company activities.
This app uses your location to support attendance verification, operational activities, and location-based services both in the foreground and background when necessary.
